text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ummm... If your nose is itchy, could you<n>tell me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I always receive tissues in the raffles<n>around town,
so I have... a lot of them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So don't worry about taking too many,<n>okay?
